Secretary Monroe, of the cham
Der of commerce, has undertaken to
annex new Zion city to Spokane.
His plan, if successful, would turn
a big portion of the south half of
the Colville reservation over to the
discntented Dowietes who are pre-
pairing to pack up and move away
from the ungodly environs of Chi
cago.


Voliva, the new Zion leader who
deposed Dowie, is agtating a west
ward migration and will soon come
this way on still hunt for a new
Zion site. Secretary Monroe imme-
diately threw out his hooks and
wrote Voliva a letter telling him of
what Spokane and the Inland EN-
pire had to offer in the way of in.
ducements He then mentioned the
fact that 100000 acres of the rich
Colville reservation will shortly be
thrown open to settlement and
limited largely of the enormous
wealth of natural resources await.
ing the Zionites there in case they
could get hold of it.
